use_cases: FAQ sections for websites and applications
Collapsible settings panels in SaaS dashboards
Product detail sections in e-commerce listings
Organizing educational course content by topic
General content organization and navigation hierarchies
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based accordion component featuring collapsible sections with smooth expand/collapse animations. Built with React and styled using Tailwind CSS, it includes a rotating chevron indicator, hover underline effects, and native keyboard navigation support. Perfect for FAQ sections, settings panels, and organized content display across various industries.
